channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cet écran PC gamer Mini LED 27″ QHD 320 Hz soldé à -26% vous permet de jouer comme un vrai Gentle Mates
item.description: Le TCL 27P2A Pro est un écran PC de 27" qui mise tout sur la fluidité pour des performances dignes de l'eSport, en Soldes à 279,99 euros au lieu de 379,99 euros.

item.title: Why is Apple asking me to pay more for Big Tech’s AI obsession?
item.description: Tim Cook recently said price increases were "unavoidable" and described the company's pricing as "unsustainable." The 16-inch MacBook Pro saw its price go up by $300. The 11-inch iPad Air went from $599 to $749. Even the HomePod Mini got a $30 bump to $129. Cook squarely placed the blame at the feet of the […]

item.title: The differences between Dolby Digital, DTS and Atmos (and which is better)
item.description: How to decide which of these surround sound formats is best for your home theater.

item.title: Prime Day is over, but the Fitbit Charge 6 just hit a record-low price
item.description: Prime Day is over, but the Fitbit Charge 6 is still on sale at Amazon for as low as $75.99, down from the list price of $159.95.

item.title: Inside the room where the smart home industry is still betting on Matter
item.description: Four years ago, overlooking a canal in Amsterdam, the smart home industry collectively launched Matter, the one interoperability standard to rule them all. Heralded as the solution to the industry's struggles, Matter was built on open standards and existing technologies and is the result of years of collaboration between traditional rivals, including Apple, Google, Amazon, […]...

item.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender season 3 — release window predictions, plot, cast and everything we know about the hit Netflix show's return
item.description: Season 2 has only just dropped, but Avatar: The Last Airbender season 3 has already been confirmed — here's everything we know about its cast, plot and release.

item.title: Power on... The Bear season 5's ending — and what its finale got right that Stranger Things and The Boys' last episodes didn't
item.description: The Bear has served its last course — and the comedy-drama's final episode is a near-perfect way for it to bow out.

item.title: How to watch MotoGP live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch MotoGP for free. Live stream the 2026 MotoGP World Championship for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: NASA tests an in-orbit refueling device for deep space missions
item.description: NASA is testing a 'cryocoupler' developed by L3Harris for in-orbit refueling.

item.title: Lego is giving away free Star Wars Bo-Katan sets at Best Buy — how to get yours today
item.description: How to get free Lego at Best Buy. The Star Wars Bo-Katan set is free at Best Buy — how to qualify for this giveaway.

item.title: The DJI Mini 4K drone is still down to best-ever price after Prime Day — buy now for $209
item.description: The best budget drone has never been cheaper after Prime Day. Grab the DJI Mini 4K for $209 before stock sells out.

item.title: Prime Day is over: We found 50+ deals still live on our Apple, Ninja, Lego, Sony, and DJI favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale has ended. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, OLED TVs, Sony headphones, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Navee dévoile (encore) une gamme de vélos électriques : cette fois, c’est la bonne ?
item.description: Suite à une première fournée de vélos électriques n’ayant pas vu le jour, Navee présente à l’Eurobike 2026 une gamme ambitieuse de 7 vélos électriques, de l’urbain au cargo en passant par le pliant et le speedbike.

item.title: Prime Day is over: We found 10+ deals still live on microSD, portable SSDs, and hard drives to beat RAMageddon
item.description: With RAMageddon, memory prices are going way up. Shop after Prime Day deals on portable SSDs, HDDs, and microSDs from Samsung, SanDisk, and Lexar.

item.title: On a testé le Trek Charger+ 4, un vélo électrique de ville très confortable à l’autonomie XXL
item.description: Dans sa version taillée pour les trajets urbains, le VAE Trek Charter+ 4 Nexus séduit par son équipement, son confort, son assistance Bosch et une autonomie XXL... aux dépens d’un poids élevé et d’une recharge lente. Nous l'avons testé, voici notre verdict.

item.title: This puzzle game’s simple premise hides surprising depth
item.description: What's the Password? has a simple concept: To solve each of the game's more than 100 puzzles, you have to type in the right four-digit password on a number pad. That might sound like a limited constraint. But the simplicity gives solo developer Dan DiIorio, better known as TrampolineTales, lots of room to play with […]

item.title: This might be the new best smart speaker
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 134, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, hope you're okay in all this heat, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Polymarket lies and Jalen Brunson and […]

item.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
item.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

item.title: A sidescrolling roguelite platformer, Steam Deck air hockey and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: The Steam Summer Sale is underway.

item.title: Uber expands US driver background checks after sexual assault lawsuits
item.description: Uber is adopting a more stringent background check process for drivers and couriers in the US.
